title: ReportTypeProfileMeta
description: Meta-schema for report-type profile files (profiles/report-types/*.json). Defines the required and optional evidence types for a specific advice/transaction report type.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI — should reference this meta-schema.

reportType.description: Unique identifier for this report/transaction type (e.g. ISA_Transfer_Cash, ISA_New).

description.description: Human-readable description of this report type and its regulatory context.

regulatoryBasis.description: List of regulatory references (FCA rules, legislation) underpinning the evidence requirements.

evidenceRequirements.description: Evidence documents that must be present and compliant before this report type is processed.

required.description: True if this evidence type is mandatory for this report.

maxAgeInDays.description: Maximum acceptable age of the evidence document in days. Null means no age restriction.

description.description: Explanation of why this evidence is required for this report type.

profileRef.description: Relative path to the evidence-profile JSON for this evidence type, if one exists.

optionalEvidence.description: Evidence documents that are useful but not required for this report type.

description.description: Explanation of when this optional evidence is useful.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was first published.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update to this profile.
